response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive senior-level experience in software development, leadership, and open-source contributions, particularly with Linux/Unix environments and modern stacks. His background includes leading teams, designing architectures, and managing complex projects, though his limited German proficiency and absence of UML expertise slightly reduce his fit. His strategic mindset, technical depth, and mentorship experience align well with the role's requirements.
strengths: Extensive senior-level experience in software development, architecture, and team leadership across multiple industries
Strong open-source contributions and deep technical expertise in Linux/Unix, modern stacks, and high-performance systems
Proven ability to mentor teams, optimize processes, and deliver scalable solutions in fast-paced environments
concerns: German language proficiency is only at a basic level (B1/B2), which falls short of the required C1 minimum
Lacks explicit mention of UML expertise, a desired qualification for modeling and design tasks
Limited evidence of strategic IT security, risk management, or compliance experience in the provided resume

key_factors.factor: Senior leadership and team management experience
